title: Develop or adapt analyses and procedures
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop or adapt analyses and procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Determine gaps and deficiencies in present methods and procedures

pcs.text: Identify opportunities to improve analyses and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify opportunities to improve analyses and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify opportunities to improve analyses and procedures.
